{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Nether-drain Swamp
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Nether-drain Swamp]] is a [[construct]] in the form of a rounded skull.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
